creator: schoutm@gmail.com
text:
I also have this problem.

On 7.2 RELEASE i386:

atapci1: <Intel ICH7 SATA300 controller> port
0xe0e0-0xe0e7,0xe0d0-0xe0d3,0xe0c0-0xe0c7,0xe0b0-0xe0b3,0xe0a0-0xe0af
irq 19 at device 31.2 on pci0
ad4: 476940MB <WDC WD5000AAKS-00YGA0 12.01C02> at ata2-master SATA150
ad6: 476940MB <WDC WD5000AAKS-00YGA0 12.01C02> at ata3-master SATA150


Motherboard is an Intel DG31PR

The controller is correctly reported as SATA300, and the drives are both
SATA-300, but they are reported and controlled as SATA150 in FreeBSD.
